channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in CSS (Weekly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in CSS nel periodo weekly.

item.title: 📝 PandoraReads/apex-dashboard (218 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: PandoraReads

📝 Repository: PandoraReads/apex-dashboard

📄 Descrizione: Stop switching between Obsidian notes. One page. Everything you need. Memo your thoughts, crush your todos, track your projects — and make it look incredible doing it.

⭐ Stelle: 218

🍴 Forks: 10

💻 Linguaggio: CSS

🏷️ Topics: dashboard dashboard-templates obsidian obsidian-plugin obsidian-plugins

📜 Licenza: BSD Zero Clause License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-14T07:42:42Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-20T05:23:03Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 ab-613/OpenGravity (178 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: ab-613

📝 Repository: ab-613/OpenGravity

📄 Descrizione: A lightweight, vanilla JS, open source BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) clone of the Google Antigravity UI. It currently features a live xterm.js terminal with direct local file system sync and a sidebar agent capable of running commands and editing files. Built in pure HTML/CSS/JS for maximum speed and zero installation.

⭐ Stelle: 178

🍴 Forks: 12

💻 Linguaggio: CSS

📜 Licenza: GNU General Public License v3.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-11T11:51:33Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-16T20:30:43Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.description:
👤 Owner: Ballwictb

📝 Repository: Ballwictb/besur-themes

📄 Descrizione: Vibrant color themes (dark, soft, light) with extended language support: JS/TS, Python, Rust, Go, PHP, SQL, XML, YAML, TOML, Markdown, Bash, and more.
